# NihonshuFYI Embed Widget

> Embeddable NihonshuFYI widgets for any website. Zero dependencies, Shadow DOM isolation, 4 themes (light/dark/sepia/auto).

## Quick Start

Add to any HTML page:
- Script: <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/nihonshufyi-embed@1/dist/embed.min.js"></script>

## Links

- Main site: https://nihonshufyi.com
- Widget docs: https://widget.nihonshufyi.com
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/nihonshufyi-embed
- GitHub: https://github.com/fyipedia/nihonshufyi-embed
- API: https://nihonshufyi.com/developers/

## Beverage FYI Widget Family

- [CocktailFYI Widget](https://widget.cocktailfyi.com)
- [VinoFYI Widget](https://widget.vinofyi.com)
- [BeerFYI Widget](https://widget.beerfyi.com)
- [BrewFYI Widget](https://widget.brewfyi.com)
- [WhiskeyFYI Widget](https://widget.whiskeyfyi.com)
- [TeaFYI Widget](https://widget.teafyi.com)
- [DrinkFYI Widget](https://widget.drinkfyi.com)

## Part of FYIPedia

Open-source developer tools ecosystem — https://fyipedia.com
